member.name: P:GTA.HandlingData.AntiRollBarBiasFront
member.summary:
Gets or sets the bias between front and rear for the anti-roll bar. This value will be set to the equivalent value in the handling.meta multiplied by 2 when
instances are initialized.
member.value: The anti roll bar bias front. 0.0f is fully front, 2.0f is fully rear.
